ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the element */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the element */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* Type of the element (e.g., face-to-face discussion, online course) */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date the element was implemented */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scales" (
  "scale_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each scale */,
  "scale_name" TEXT /* Name of the scale */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scale */,
  "min_rating" REAL /* Minimum rating for the scale */,
  "max_rating" REAL /* Maximum rating for the scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "scale_id" TEXT /* ID of the scale the category belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "element_id" TEXT /* ID of the element being evaluated */,
  "scale_id" TEXT /* ID of the assessment scale used */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category selected */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_note" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_scale_id FOREIGN KEY ("scale_id") REFERENCES scales ("scale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the element (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given to the element (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "element_id" TEXT /* ID of the element */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_history_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_history_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., educator, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email address of the school principal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the program (e.g., degree, certificate) */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_users" (
  "school_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school-user association */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the school (e.g., teacher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_users_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_elements" (
  "program_element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program-element association */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "element_id" TEXT /* ID of the element */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the element in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_elements_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_elements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_scale_categories" (
  "evaluation_scale_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scale-category association */,
  "scale_id" TEXT /* ID of the scale */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "category_weight" REAL /* Weight of the category in the scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_scale_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scale_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scale_categories_scale_id FOREIGN KEY ("scale_id") REFERENCES scales ("scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_scale_category_results" (
  "evaluation_scale_category_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scale-category result */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_scale_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scale-category association */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the element for the scale-category combination */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given to the element for the scale-category combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_scale_category_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scale_category_results_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scale_category_results_evaluation_scale_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_scale_category_id") REFERENCES evaluation_scale_categories ("evaluation_scale_category_id")
)
